title: PGIMER Notification 2026 - Apply Online for Project Research Scientist I Posts
description: Postgraduate Institute of Medical Education and Research (PGIMER) has declared the official notification for the recruitment of various Project Research Scientist I Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the MBBS or BDS can grab this chance and apply for the PGIMER Notification 2026. Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts.
